channel.title: RaspberryPi on upyesp
channel.description: Recent content in RaspberryPi on upyesp

item.title: Raspberry Pi Pretty Prompt, With... Oh My Posh, Neofetch & LSD
item.description: Give your Raspberry Pi’s command-line a boost by adding Oh My Posh and add a few other neat utilities. Before starting, make sure your Pi is running a 64bit operating system, such as Raspberry Pi OS, Ubuntu 22.04 LTS Desktop or Server and Manjaro 22.04.
